content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月16日 周四
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [xai-org/grok-build](https://github.com/xai-org/grok-build)
   SpaceXAI's coding agent harness and TUI. Fullscreen, mouse interactive, extensib | ⭐2129
2. [mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide](https://github.com/mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide)
   Local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE for verifiable autonomous software developme | ⭐810
3. [QuantumByteOSS/quantumbyte](https://github.com/QuantumByteOSS/quantumbyte)
   Open-source app builder engine — intent to working app | ⭐310
4. [vshulcz/deja-vu](https://github.com/vshulcz/deja-vu)
   Memory layer for coding agents: search, MCP recall, auto-context, secret redacti | ⭐189
5. [Extraltodeus/J-Wash](https://github.com/Extraltodeus/J-Wash)
   Jacobian-Brainwash : A manual alignment tool for large language models built on  | ⭐157
6. [nihe0909/xiaohongshu-ai-workbench](https://github.com/nihe0909/xiaohongshu-ai-workbench)
   《小红书运营手册 · AI工作台》: free Codex Skills for Xiaohongshu operations | ⭐153
7. [videlalvaro/inference-school](https://github.com/videlalvaro/inference-school)
   A hands-on Swift and Metal course for building LLM inference from first principl | ⭐142
8. [zjp1997720/codex-model-routing-team](https://github.com/zjp1997720/codex-model-routing-team)
   Route complex Codex tasks to model-specific background workers with bounded conc | ⭐134

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
